title: CASY, RH, PL, ORCL, SNPS, RBRK, CNM, SAIL, AVAV, GME, CHWY, DAKT, ADBE, KR | Q2 2025 Earnings Preview: September 8-11, 2025
author: tickeron_community
selftext: As the third quarter of 2025 unfolds, investors prepare for a critical earnings week spanning September 8-11 that will provide essential insights into corporate resilience amid a complex economic landscape. The week presents earnings reports across diverse sectors—from consumer retail and technology to defense and grocery—offering a comprehensive view of corporate performance in an environment marked by cautious optimism, elevated market valuations, and evolving monetary policy expectations.
